title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day by 1.93%, the main contract I2401 closed 978.5. sometraders quotation is still stronger . Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
